metadata.name: Book Team Hotel for Away Game

description: A travel manager needs to book a block of hotel rooms for the team for an upcoming away game.

nodes.task_description: Identify the number of rooms needed and the check-in/check-out dates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the specific lodging requirements.

nodes.task_description: Search for hotels near the opponent's stadium that have the required availability and meet the team's standards.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds two suitable hotels with availability.

nodes.task_description: Negotiate a group rate and book the block of rooms.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books the rooms at a discounted rate.
